category_sources: source_facts.description says fully-configurable hex grid generator; official homepage says it generates hexagonal grids used for strategy games.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mkhexgrid; official homepage title is mkhexgrid.
docs_sources: Official homepage links README, Tutorial, and Reference Manual; tutorial and reference manual are official documentation pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage provides source tarball downloads but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official homepage/reference manual describe hex grids, strategy games, PNG, SVG, and PostScript output.
